title: Manufacturing Engineer - Bharat Petroleum - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Bharat Petroleum - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Bharat Petroleum is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Indore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Bharat Petroleum:
Bharat Petroleum is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bharat Petroleum!
